nasb.text: For I have no pleasure in the death of anyone who dies,” declares the Lord God. “Therefore, repent and live.”

esv.text: For I have no pleasure in the death of anyone, declares the Lord God; so turn, and live.”

cnv.text: “我不喜悅任何人滅亡，所以你們要回轉，得以存活。這是主耶和華的宣告。”

ccb.text: 主耶和华说，‘我断不喜欢任何人死亡，你们要悔改，以便存活。’”
